entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The target crop (Cicer arietinum) for genetic improvement of yield and quality

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The amount of seed produced, a key target for crop improvement

entities.name: SEED QUALITY
entities.description: The nutritional and physical characteristics of the seeds

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The overall efficiency of seed production in the crop

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The use of genomic tools to enhance crop traits and productivity

entities.name: PYRAMIDING
entities.description: The process of combining multiple genes into a single genotype to improve multiple traits

entities.name: EPISTATIC AND PLEIOTROPIC EFFECTS
entities.description: Genetic interactions where one gene masks another or one gene influences multiple traits

entities.name: AGROMORPHOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Physical characteristics of the plant related to its growth and structure

entities.name: COMBINATORIAL GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding strategy combining various genomic tools to identify and introgress desirable alleles

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of how genes and their products function within a biological system

entities.name: ABCC3-TYPE TRANSPORTER GENE
entities.description: A gene that regulates seed weight and the transport of glutathione conjugates

entities.name: SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of individual seeds, identified as a domestication trait

entities.name: DOMESTICATION TRAIT
entities.description: Traits that were selected for during the process of crop domestication

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTIONAL REGULATION
entities.description: The process of controlling the conversion of DNA to RNA to regulate gene expression

entities.name: TRANSPORT OF GLUTATHIONE CONJUGATES
entities.description: The movement of glutathione-linked molecules within the seed

entities.name: DESI CHICKPEA
entities.description: A specific variety of chickpea used in the study

entities.name: KABULI CHICKPEA
entities.description: A specific variety of chickpea used in the study

entities.name: NEAR-ISOGENIC LINES
entities.description: Genetically identical lines except for a specific locus, used to validate gene effects

entities.name: PLANT ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The physical structure and arrangement of the plant's organs

entities.name: AGRONOMIC PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The overall performance of the crop under field conditions
